global.description: The ad features a dark background with sliding panels and promotional text.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: three sliding panels
elements.description: Three vertical sliding panels with a gray color, resembling a modern interface element.

elements.label: sliding panel
elements.description: A single vertical sliding panel with a gray color, part of a set of three.

elements.label: sliding panel
elements.description: Another vertical sliding panel with a gray color, part of the three-panel design.

elements.label: circular indicator
elements.description: A small circular indicator located below the sliding panels, indicating selection or progress.

elements.label: promotional text
elements.description: Text in a modern font stating 'Fast food, fast Late-night deals available', positioned prominently in the center.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available

elements.label: FreshDash SALE
elements.description: Bold text at the top of the ad reading 'FreshDash SALE', designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer', inviting user interaction.
